positive: A stylized celestial forest scene, featuring luminous bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a deep indigo and sapphire gradient night sky. The central composition highlights giant, stylized mushrooms and twisting roots that form intricate, symmetrical patterns. Minimalist art style, strong woodcut etching contrast, ultra-detailed line work, clean silhouette focus, gothic nature aesthetic. Dramatic, ethereal backlighting filtering through glowing leaves. High contrast ink wash effect, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, noise, messy, grayscale, photographic, photorealism
